<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Connection\Replication; use Predis\Connection\AggregateConnectionInterface; use Predis\Connection\NodeConnectionInterface; /** * Defines a group of Redis nodes in a master / slave replication setup. */ interface ReplicationInterface extends AggregateConnectionInterface { /** * Switches the internal connection in use to the master server. */ public function switchToMaster(); /** * Switches the internal connection in use to a random slave server. */ public function switchToSlave(); /** * Returns the connection in use by the replication backend. * * @return NodeConnectionInterface */ public function getCurrent(); /** * Returns the connection to the master server. * * @return NodeConnectionInterface */ public function getMaster(); /** * Returns a list of connections to slave servers. * * @return NodeConnectionInterface[] */ public function getSlaves(); }
